description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low brick wall and lush landscaping, including palm trees and flowering shrubs. The building features a flat roof with multiple skylights and a large, paved courtyard area. There is a prominent front entrance with a covered porch, and a driveway leading to a double garage. The backyard includes a patio with outdoor furniture and a small garden area, while the side yard has a swing set and additional greenery. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with large panes providing ample natural light. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, lush landscaping, a double garage, and spacious outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, driveway, and lush landscaping with palm trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and a backyard patio with outdoor furniture and garden features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the double garage, paved courtyard, and extensive greenery along the perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the swing set, additional garden space, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
